$comment: Reef approval policy. Copy to .reef/policy.json (or point REEF_POLICY_FILE at it). Rules are evaluated in order, first match wins; anything unmatched falls through to the default (gated tools still ask for approval). This example auto-allows a conservative dev-loop shell safelist so edit -> typecheck -> test runs unattended-but-recorded; git push, rm, anything chained/redirected, and anything not listed still gate. Auto-allow only ever applies to plain commands (no ; && | > backtick $( quotes etc.); matching is on parsed argv prefixes, so ["git","diff"] allows `git diff --stat` but not `git push`.
